content.text: ShaderDB dump mode captures original D3D11 shader bytecode for the current runtime. Use PreNG for now; PostNG/PostAE ShaderDBs are not available yet.
Dumps are written to Data/F4SE/Plugins/fo4CS/ShaderDump/<Runtime>. Changes take effect after restarting the game.

content.help: Development option for generating ShaderDB source data. Leave disabled during normal gameplay.
